depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the element whose position is described by this metadata.

fields.name: measurement
fields.documentation: Ontology term classifying what kind of position is recorded by the linked element (e.g., a midpoint position, an anatomical landmark, a probe tip). The `node` is the v1 `ontologyNode` CURIE verbatim; `name` is resolved via ndi.ontology.lookup at conversion time.

fields.name: units
fields.documentation: Ontology term naming the measurement unit for the position values (e.g., 'micrometer'). Resolved via ndi.ontology.lookup.

fields.name: dimensions
fields.documentation: Array of per-axis records describing each spatial dimension of the position measurement. v1 stored dimensions as a comma-separated CURIE list with implicit positional ordering; V_delta makes the ordering explicit via the `axis` field while preserving the ontology classification. The migrator labels axes as `axis_1`, `axis_2`, ... by default; an explicit `x`/`y`/`z` convention can be applied per-document where the spatial mapping is known.

fields.name: axis
fields.documentation: Per-record axis identifier. Defaults to positional labels (`axis_1`, `axis_2`, ...); consumers may rewrite to a spatial convention (e.g., `x`, `y`, `z`) when known.

fields.name: node
fields.documentation: Ontology CURIE classifying this axis (e.g., a directional or anatomical-axis ontology node).

fields.name: name
fields.documentation: Human-readable label resolved from `node` via ndi.ontology.lookup at conversion time. Empty when the lookup is unavailable.
